headline: Venmo Continues Its Evolution from a Peer-to-Peer App into a Money Movement App for the Next Generation
summary: Venmo today announced the expansion of Stash¹, its rewards program, giving customers a new way to earn cash back on everyday purchases from some of their favorite lifestyle brands. From dinner with friends and a rideshare home to a new outfit, those everyday moments are now even more valuable. The more customers spend with Venmo, the more they get back.

content.title: Venmo Continues Its Evolution from a Peer-to-Peer App into a Money Movement App for the Next Generation
content.summary: Venmo today announced the expansion of Stash¹, its rewards program, giving customers a new way to earn cash back on everyday purchases from some of their favorite lifestyle brands. From dinner with friends and a rideshare home to a new outfit, those everyday moments are now even more valuable. The more customers spend with Venmo, the more they get back.

thumbnail.caption: Two friends. One realization. The app they've always used to pay each other back can also earn them cash back. Rachel Sennott and Jordan Firstman for Venmo.
